title: Depth Recurrence 5x3 d672 SwiGLU
body:
## Summary
- 5 unique transformer blocks reused 3x for 15 effective layers at width 672
- SwiGLU MLP replacing relu-squared at matched param count (~16.5M)
- Eval at seqlen 2048 for longer context (rules allow any eval seqlen)
- Warmdown, momentum warmup, and grad clip tuned for shorter step budget
- int8+zlib artifact well under 16MB cap

## Approach
Depth recurrence trades training steps for effective compute per token. With the baseline massively over-trained (420 tokens/param vs Chinchilla-optimal ~20), this is a favorable trade. The model sees ~2.5B tokens instead of 7.2B but processes each through 15 layers at d=672 instead of 9 layers at d=512. Total training FLOPs are comparable.

## Status
Pending H100 run for final val_bpb and train.log. Requesting compute to verify.

## Test plan
- [ ] Run on 8xH100 within 10-minute wallclock
- [ ] Verify int8+zlib artifact < 16,000,000 bytes
- [ ] Report final_int8_zlib_roundtrip val_bpb
- [ ] Add train.log to submission
- [ ] Update submission.json with real values
